text.title: Bundle vs Split Tools Decision Tree

root-question.text: Is total tool count ≥ 25 OR tool-selection error rate > 5%?

branch.conclusion: Default split. No methodology action needed.

question.text: Does a candidate group of 3+ tools share audience AND most arg shape AND have a training-data prior (e.g. CRUD, search-multi-source)?
Does the 50-task eval show quality drop ≤ 2% when bundled?

branch.conclusion: Bundle this group with enum-constrained mode arg. Document per-mode descriptions including "do NOT use" lines.
Revert to split. Per-mode descriptions failed to disambiguate; quality drop exceeds 2%.
No suitable bundle group. Refactor offending tools (clearer names, better descriptions) instead.

example.p: tools=42 → needs_action=true → bundleable=true (search_email/slack/docs) → eval_ok=true (delta=-0.8%) → conclusion: bundle into search(source enum).
